commands.review_summary:
Adds a 60s gateway scheduled recovery loop for restart-continuation session deliveries, wires a shutdown stop handle, and extends gateway lifecycle tests.

PR surface: Source +44, Tests +91. Total +135 across 6 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows current main only performs one delayed startup recovery, while the linked issue and PR proof show a failed retry entry can remain queued until a later scheduler path runs.
commands.review_followup: - No automated repair lane is needed; the remaining action is maintainer acceptance of the new 60s delivery retry loop and normal required checks.
